ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cache_levels" (
  "cache_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache level */,
  "cache_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the cache level (e.g., L1, L2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cache level */,
  "associativity" TEXT /* Associativity of the cache (e.g., direct-mapped, 2-way set associative, fully associative) */,
  "line_size" INTEGER /* Size of each cache line in bytes */,
  "replacement_policy" TEXT /* Policy used to replace cache lines (e.g., LRU, FIFO, Random) */,
  "write_policy" TEXT /* Write policy (e.g., Write-Through, Write-Back) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "cache_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cache level the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., Total size in blocks, Block size in bytes) */,
  "typical_values" TEXT /* Typical values of the characteristic */,
  "minimum_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the characteristic */,
  "maximum_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the characteristic */,
  "average_value" INTEGER /* Average value of the characteristic */,
  "standard_deviation" INTEGER /* Standard deviation of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_characteristics_cache_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_level_id") REFERENCES cache_levels ("cache_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_types" (
  "memory_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory type */,
  "memory_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory type (e.g., Paged memory, TLB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory type */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency of the memory type in nanoseconds */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth of the memory type in bytes per second */,
  "access_policy" TEXT /* Access policy (e.g., Random, Sequential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memory_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "memory_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory type the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., Total size in blocks, Block size in bytes) */,
  "typical_values" TEXT /* Typical values of the characteristic */,
  "minimum_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the characteristic */,
  "maximum_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the characteristic */,
  "average_value" INTEGER /* Average value of the characteristic */,
  "standard_deviation" INTEGER /* Standard deviation of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_characteristics_memory_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("memory_type_id") REFERENCES memory_types ("memory_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the analytic */,
  "analytic_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytic */,
  "analytic_data" TEXT /* Data for the analytic */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytic was generated */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., performance, comparison) */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
